trade_reflections.reflection:
Outcome: 🛑 Stop Loss
What to learn:
  • Score was 10/14 — barely passed threshold. Borderline setups lose more often.
  • ADX 19.5 was below 22 — trend was weak, increasing whipsaw risk.
  • HTF bias was not fully aligned (W1:NEUTRAL, D1:NEUTRAL) — higher timeframe neutrality often means chop.
